title: School turned into shelter for families displaced in southern Lebanon
fullText: NewsFeedFamilies displaced by Israeli air strikes in southern Lebanon have taken refuge in a school in Sidon. At least 30,000 people have sought shelter since hostilities between Israel and Hezbollah escalated this week.Published On 3 Mar 2026
summary: Families displaced by Israeli air strikes in southern Lebanon have taken refuge in a school in Sidon.
